included.reason: always included — owns the feature cut and MVP boundary
always included — owns feasibility and the SSO/pipeline integration
internal-tool default; this tool authorizes production changes and keeps an audit trail, so authz and audit-integrity are core, not optional

excluded.reason: declined — two internal expert users, a request form + an approval list; no bespoke UX, reuse the internal component library. Revisit only if usage data shows the approval flow confuses leads.

declined — small internal tool on a 1-3 month timeline; acceptance-level checks on the approval loop are covered by the Engineer's design and the tickets. Revisit if the tool becomes load-bearing for many teams.
